title: selenicereus alliodorus
intro: Selenicereus alliodorus, also known as the "Moonlight Cactus," is a species of epiphytic cactus native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Selenicereus alliodorus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Selenicereus alliodorus are often made by drying the plant's stems and leaves, which can then be used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions.
